data.title: Mistral Inc. and Uvision Inc. secure $982M contract with US Army for HERO 120 Loitering Munition.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on October 2, 2025, Mistral Inc., a prominent supplier of cutting-edge defense systems, revealed a partnership with Uvision Inc. (previously UVision USA). The U.S. Army has granted them a multi-year Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract worth a significant amount.

data.title: GDIT wins $1.25B contract to support US Army Europe and Africa with AI/ML, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and data analytics.
data.description: In Falls Church, Virginia on October 2, 2025, it was revealed that General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT), a segment of General Dynamics (NYSE:GD), will utilize artificial intelligence/machine learning, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and data analytics technologies to boost operational preparedness. The company plans to harness these capabilities to enhance their services.
Trump – Reiterates Plan To “Take Care Of Portland”

data.title: CarMax, Inc. faces investor scrutiny after $142 million loss provision, shares drop 20%.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in San Francisco, CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) experienced a significant sell-off as its stock dropped almost 20% on September 25, 2025, after the unveiling of its second-quarter 2026 financial performance. The unexpected increase in... led to this decline, surprising shareholders and causing a notable impact on the company's stock value.

data.title: Bitcoin expected to reach $125,000 due to gold rally and decreased inflation risks, boosting interest rate cut hopes.
data.description: With the price of Bitcoin steadily rising, reaching towards the $125,000 mark, investors are growing more confident in the cryptocurrency. This growing interest is a result of the recent surge in gold prices and the shrinking concerns about inflation rates. Investors are increasingly optimistic about potential interest rate reductions and are turning towards alternative assets, like Bitcoin, for a potential rally.

data.title: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. reports success in exchange offer & consent solicitation involving unsecured notes, increasing interest rate to 14%.
data.description: Getty Images Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GETY) announced that their subsidiary, Getty Images, Inc., is offering an exchange for all outstanding unsecured 9.750% Senior Notes due 2027 (the “Old Notes”) with newly issued unsecured 14.000% Senior Notes due 2028 (the “New Notes”). This offer is part of a Consent Solicitation to amend the terms of the Old Notes indenture. The exchange was disclosed in a confidential Offering Memorandum dated September 18, 2025. The early results of this offer have been released on October 02, 2025.
TRUMP: YOU GROW YOURSELF OUT OF DEBT

data.title: Owlet grants 129,863 restricted shares to VP Jordan Thompson as part of new employee inducement under NYSE Rule 303A.08.
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT), known for its smart infant monitoring technology, revealed that on September 30, 2025, the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned an equity inducement grant for Jordan Thompson, Owlet's Vice President and Corporate Controller. This award was granted to facilitate Mr. Thompson's employment with the company. The equity award comprises 129,863 restricted stocks.

data.title: Hospice East Bay joins Chapters Health System, becoming the fourth affiliation in Chapters Health West Division.
data.description: Temple Terrace, Florida - On October 2, 2025, Chapters Health System revealed their affiliation with a fourth organization in their newly established Chapters Health West Division. This move solidifies their position as the primary chronic illness innovator and the largest nonprofit hospice network in the country. The announcement signifies the completion of a significant partnership for Chapters Health System as they continue to expand their reach and impact in the healthcare sector.

Trump – Reiterates Potential Tariff Dividends Of $1,000–$2,000 To Americans

data.title: NRG’s Impact Week: 2M meals prepared in 41 communities of US and Canada to fight food insecurity.
data.description: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) recently held its 18th annual positiveNRG Impact Week, where employees from 41 communities in the US and Canada joined forces to combat food insecurity. Between September 15 and 19, the NRG team worked together to pack, sort, and create more than 2 million meals for local nonprofits that support those struggling with hunger. Melissa Hensle emphasized, "Food insecurity impacts all aspects of our communities, and we are committed to making a meaningful difference."
Trump – Says Shutdown Could Lead To Permanent Project Cuts

data.title: Molpus Woodlands Group buys 173,000 acres in AL, LA, MS, sees investment opportunity in well-managed timberlands.
data.description: In Jackson, Mississippi, The Molpus Woodlands Group, LLC (Molpus), a top timberland investment manager, recently acquired around 173,000 acres of timberland across Alabama, Louisiana, and Mississippi. The properties are known for their well-maintained, premium timberlands. Molpus sees this purchase as an attractive investment due to the strategic locations offering diverse and plentiful pulpwood opportunities for its clients.

data.title: Diversified Royalty Corp. declared $0.02292 per share dividend payable on Oct 31, 2025 to shareholders on record by Oct 15.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 2, 2025, Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV and DIV.DB.A) has announced that its board of directors has given the green light to a cash dividend of $0.02292 per common share for the period between October 1, 2025, and October 31, 2025, equivalent to $0.275 annually per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on October 31, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of the end of business on October 15, 2025.

data.title: Associated Banc-Corp will report Q3 earnings on Oct 23, 2025, after market close. Conference call to follow.
data.description: Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) of Green Bay, Wisconsin, declared that they plan to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 23, 2025, following the market's closure on that day. They will also conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on the same day.

data.title: American Outdoor Brands approved $10M share repurchase program by Board of Directors.
data.description: In Columbia, Missouri, on October 2nd, 2025, American Outdoor Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: AOUT), specializing in outdoor product solutions, revealed that its Board of Directors greenlit the buyback of $10 million worth of shares.

data.title: Simpro Group appoints Fred Voccola as CEO, who transformed Kaseya into a $15 billion global leader.
data.description: Miami-based Simpro Group, a leading provider of AI-driven field service solutions for commercial and residential trades, has named Fred Voccola as its new Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer. Voccola, who previously played a pivotal role in propelling Kaseya to a $15 billion valuation as its CEO, is set to bring his expertise in driving profitability and growth to Simpro Group. Known for his success in empowering small to medium-sized managed service providers, Voccola is poised to lead Simpro Group to new heights in its industry.

data.title: Vesta to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 23, 2025. Conference call on Oct 24, 2025 at 11:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time.
data.description: Mexico City-based real estate company, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA), will unveil its Third Quarter 2025 financial results on October 23, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for October 24, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time. To join the call, participants can connect through webcast or dial in internationally.
